description: Welcome to Niche – a collection of Cape Cod inspired townhomes bordering nature! This 3 bedroom, 3 bathroom home is situated in the most secluded & desirable location in the complex, beside ample visitor parking. Recently updated with new carpets, laminate flooring throughout, fresh paint, new light fixtures and new A/C split unit systems throughout. Open main floor plan offers a kitchen with white shaker cabinets, quartz counter tops, SS appliances, gas range and lots of natural light. South facing yard with tons of natural light - fenced and private. Spacious dining area and powder room. Rear balcony is perfect for summer BBQs. Spacious bedrooms upstairs including primary with 4 pc ensuite, laundry and additional full bath. Huge garage with workshop area in the rear.  Truly must SEE!
